title: Strüngmann Award Honors Araris Biotech Founding Team as 2025 Winner
author: Trophic Communications
description: Araris Biotech founders Dragan Grabulovski, Philipp Spycher, and Isabella Attinger-Toller won the 2025 Strüngmann Award for their innovative antibody-drug conjugate technology in cancer therapy, receiving a €100,000 prize and recognition for their successful startup journey.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Formed strategic partnership with Araris Biotech, indicating potential interest in their technology
Formed strategic partnership with Araris Biotech, indicating potential interest in their technology

title: Strüngmann Award zeichnet Gründerteam von Araris Biotech als Preisträger 2025 aus
author: Not Specified
description: Araris Biotech founders Dr. Dragan Grabulovski, Dr. Philipp Spycher, and Dr. Isabella Attinger-Toller won the 2025 Strüngmann Award for developing innovative antibody-drug conjugate technology in cancer therapy, receiving a €100,000 prize after being acquired by Taiho Pharmaceutical.
